---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or behavior
title: '[feature] '
labels: feature, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## The problem this solves

<!-- Describe the situation in which you would use this feature, and
     what is currently missing or awkward. Feature requests are weighed
     by problem size, not solution elegance. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- If you have a specific design in mind, describe it. If you do
     not, leave this section blank — sometimes the right design only
     emerges after a discussion. -->

## What this would NOT be

<!-- Per LIMITATIONS.md, GridSeak deliberately stays out of certain
     domains (agent-side code generation, telemetry, auto-update,
     etc.). Briefly say why this feature does not violate those
     boundaries. If you think the boundary itself should move, say
     that — but say it explicitly. -->

## Alternatives I considered

<!-- Existing workarounds, other tools that do something similar,
     or other GridSeak features that almost solve the problem but
     not quite. -->

## Area

- [ ] Affects analysis engine (graphengine-*)
- [ ] Affects CLI (`gridseak ...`)
- [ ] Affects MCP tools
- [ ] Affects install / distribution / setup
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other / unsure

## How urgent

- [ ] Blocking my use of GridSeak
- [ ] Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Nice to have

(Honest answers help prioritize. "Blocking" gets attention first;
"nice to have" may wait.)
